response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled VTuber spoken dialogue matching the hardcoded Japanese subtitles. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was not applicable as it is a spoken dialogue scene, so manual transcription/translation was fully applied based on the hardcoded Japanese subtitles on screen. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to match the vocal bursts and aligned with visual transitions of the text boxes.

subtitles.original: 一曲目からもうめっちゃカッコいいよね！その熱さ、感じてるわ！わ！\nやばいっすね
subtitles.english: Even from the first song, it was so cool! I'm feeling that heat! Wow!\nThat's crazy!

subtitles.original: アドレナリンがわいてくるんだもん\nこれ走りたくなるっすね
subtitles.english: Adrenaline is rushing. This makes me want to run!

subtitles.original: おいおいおい どこ行くの？
subtitles.english: Hey hey hey, where are you going?

subtitles.original: いやいやストップストップ！
subtitles.english: No, stop stop stop!

subtitles.original: 汗かくよ！汗！
subtitles.english: You'll sweat! Sweat!

subtitles.original: カエラはどう？
subtitles.english: How about you, Kaela?

subtitles.original: わあ、すごく楽しい\nまさか自分がここに立てるとは思わなかったよ
subtitles.english: Wow, it's so much fun! I never thought I'd be standing here.

subtitles.original: でもちなみにライブはまだまだ長いから\n最後まで張り切っていこうね！
subtitles.english: But by the way, the concert is still very long, so let's keep our energy up until the end!

subtitles.original: 張り切ろう！
subtitles.english: Let's do our best!

subtitles.original: でもさっきからライブの話してるけど\nみんなライブのタイトル知ってる？
subtitles.english: But we've been talking about the concert, does everyone know the title of it?

subtitles.original: 今回のライブは題して「Chromatic Future」！
subtitles.english: Our concert title this time is "Chromatic Future"!

subtitles.original: 意味わかる人？手を挙げて！
subtitles.english: Anyone who knows what it means? Raise your hands!

subtitles.original: こぼが絶対知ってるね
subtitles.english: Kobo definitely knows best!

subtitles.original: そうですね、一番背が高い人が説明するっす！
subtitles.english: That's right, let the tallest person explain!

subtitles.original: そう来るかい！まあいいか
subtitles.english: Oh, is that how it is? Fine, then!

subtitles.original: 初めての人も聞いてね
subtitles.english: Listen up, guys, for those of you who don't know...

subtitles.original: 「Chromatic Future」ってのは\nカラフルな未来ってことだよ！
subtitles.english: "Chromatic Future" means a colorful future!

subtitles.original: ホロライブインドネシアは もう5周年になるからね
subtitles.english: Since Hololive Indonesia is already celebrating its 5th anniversary...

subtitles.original: 私たちはみんなデビューから今日まで 一緒に歩んできたわけ！
subtitles.english: We've all walked together from day one until today!

subtitles.original: それでこれから先も、私たちがカラフルな時間と思い出を創り出せたらいいなってこと\nもちろんホロライブインドネシアのファンとも一緒に！
subtitles.english: So we hope to continue creating colorful times and memories in the future, of course, together with all the fans of Hololive Indonesia!

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、カエラ・コヴァルスキア！メモってね！\nそうそうそう
subtitles.english: Exactly, Kaela Kovalskia! Take notes! Yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: さて、皆さんもうわかりましたよね？\nさっきカエラが説明したから
subtitles.english: Now, you all understand, right? Since Kaela just explained it to you.

subtitles.original: ってことでライブも始まってることだし
subtitles.english: And so, since the concert has already started...

subtitles.original: 本日のライブのことをSNSに投稿する際は
subtitles.english: When you post about this concert on social media...

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグ #holoIDChromaticFuture も\n忘れずに付けてくださいわ！
subtitles.english: Don't forget to use the hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture!

subtitles.original: だってみんなのその…なんていうの、えっと…\n情熱が！見たいから！
subtitles.english: Because we really want to see your... how do you say... passion!

subtitles.original: そうっす！そうっすね！
subtitles.english: Exactly! That's right!

subtitles.original: 打ち間違えないでね！
subtitles.english: Don't make typos, don't make typos!

subtitles.original: いえーい！絶対投稿してね！
subtitles.english: Yay! Be sure to share it with everyone, okay?

subtitles.original: でも正直に言って\n「インドネシアライブやるんだよ！」って 言われた時びっくりした？
subtitles.english: But honestly, when you were told, "We're doing a concert in Indonesia!", were you surprised?

subtitles.original: もしもし？聞いてくれる？
subtitles.english: Hello? Is anyone listening?

subtitles.original: そうっすね！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: そうっす！あたしも同感！\n妹のゼータに共感しているっす そうね、共感ね
subtitles.english: Exactly! I agree too! I feel empathy for my younger sister Zeta. Yeah, empathy.

subtitles.original: カエラ・コヴァルスキアはどう？
subtitles.english: How about you, Kaela Kovalskia?

subtitles.original: 私もびっくりしたよ\nなんかこう「え？マジで？」って感じ
subtitles.english: I was surprised too, like "Huh? Seriously? For real?"

subtitles.original: なんかこう「え！ついにインドネシアで9人そろって ライブできるんだ！」って！マジかっこいいよね！
subtitles.english: Like "Wow, can that really happen? Finally, and with all nine of us in Indonesia!" It's so cool.

subtitles.original: かっこいいっす！
subtitles.english: It's so cool!

subtitles.original: はい、これが初めてホロライブ\nインドネシアの9人全員でのライブだから
subtitles.english: Yes, because this is the first live concert with all nine members of Hololive Indonesia.

subtitles.original: 実はこれはホロライブインドネシアのファンに\nとても重要な瞬間でもあるんだけど
subtitles.english: Actually, this is a very important moment for Hololive Indonesia fans...

subtitles.original: 世界中のみんなも見てくれるんでしょう？
subtitles.english: But everyone around the world is watching too, right?

subtitles.original: いや、ちがう？
subtitles.english: Or is that not the case?

subtitles.original: お答えして
subtitles.english: Please answer.

subtitles.original: はいはい！みんなありがとう！
subtitles.english: Yes yes! Thank you, everyone!

subtitles.original: でももちろんこれで終わりってわけじゃないよね？
subtitles.english: But of course, our achievements won't just stop here, right?

subtitles.original: だから次はこう…世界征服ってのはどう？\n我々はレディー！レディー！ レディーレディー！
subtitles.english: So, maybe next we can... dominate the world? We are ready! Ready! Ready, ready!

subtitles.original: そうっよカエラ！ゼータ！
subtitles.english: That's right, Kaela! Zeta!

subtitles.original: この機会におけるファンの支援に加えて
subtitles.english: In addition to the support of our fans for this opportunity...

subtitles.original: このライブを実現させるために支援いただいた\nスポンサーの皆様にも感謝申し上げまーす！
subtitles.english: We would also like to thank all the sponsors who supported us in making this concert happen!

subtitles.original: ありがとうっす！ ありがとう！ありがとうっす！\nみんなありがとうね！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! Thank you, everyone!

subtitles.original: サンキューサンキュー
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: ところでこのライブって 何か違うところあるのかな？\nカエラ気づいた？ 一番気が利くから
subtitles.english: By the way, is there something different about this concert? Kaela, did you notice? Since you're the most observant.

subtitles.original: もちろんっす
subtitles.english: Of course.

subtitles.original: もちろんそうだよ\nこぼは気づかないと思うけど
subtitles.english: Of course. I don't think Kobo would notice, though.

subtitles.original: これだよ
subtitles.english: It's this.

subtitles.original: 私たちの身体いつもとちょっと違うんだよ
subtitles.english: Our bodies are a bit different than usual.

subtitles.original: かわいい！クルクル！
subtitles.english: Cute! Spin, spin!

subtitles.original: かわいいかわいい！
subtitles.english: Cute, cute!

subtitles.original: カメラこっち！こっち向けて！こっちこっち！\n始まったなこれ
subtitles.english: Camera here! Point it this way! Here, here! It has begun.

subtitles.original: ほらほら！こぼのかわいさを見て！
subtitles.english: Look, look! See Kobo's cuteness!

subtitles.original: これこれ、お尻
subtitles.english: Look, look, my butt.

subtitles.original: えー！お尻！
subtitles.english: Eh, butt!

subtitles.original: おいおいおい こぼがカメラ全部乗っ取ってるじゃん
subtitles.english: Hey hey hey, Kobo is hogging all the cameras.

subtitles.original: こっちにも向けてよ こぼだけには向けないで
subtitles.english: Point it over here too, don't just focus on Kobo.

subtitles.original: いち、に、さん…はい終わり！こぼの番っす！\nこっちにも向けてよ こぼだけには向けないで
subtitles.english: One, two, three... okay, it's over! It's Kobo's turn!

subtitles.original: ストップストップ！やめてって！\nカメラ全部乗っ取らないでよ！
subtitles.english: Stop, stop, stop! Don't take over all the cameras!

subtitles.original: はいはい… それじゃあ
subtitles.english: Okay, okay... Well then...

subtitles.original: やばいちょっと息切れた\nライブではしゃがない！ はいー
subtitles.english: Gosh, I'm a bit out of breath. Don't fight in front of the concert stage! Okay.

subtitles.original: はいはいー はいよ\nゼータが怒ると怖いからね
subtitles.english: Yes, yes. Zeta is scary when she gets angry.
